Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Defendants American International Industries, Inc., Aryz Corp., Erx Corp., Glamour Industries Co. And Razy Properties
Off Calendar Apr-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL INDUSTRIES, ARYZ CORP., ERX CORP., GLAMOUR INDUSTRIES, CO. AND RAZY PROPERTIES, INC.'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION.
APPEARANCES: LISA TANDOC, ESQUIRE (BRAYTON PURCELL, 415.898.1555) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. KEVIN MINTZ, ESQUIRE (RANKIN SPROAT, ET AL., 510.465.3922) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS LISTED ABOVE.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION AND ALSO GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL INDUSTRIES, ARYZ CORP., ERX CORP., GLAMOUR INDUSTRIES, CO., RAZY PROPERTIES, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: WILLIAM F. RUIZ, ESQUIRE (BRAYTON PURCELL, 415.898.1555) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. KEVIN MINTZ, ESQUIRE (RANKIN SPROAT, ET AL., 510.465.3922) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. THE LOVELESS DECLARATION FAILS TO ESTABLISH THAT KLEER-VU AND NESLEMUR REMAINED VIABLE BUSINESSES AFTER THE ACQUISITION. SEE CHAKNOVA V WILBUR-ELLIS CO. (1999) 69 CAL. APP. 4th 962, 876-877. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE ARE SUSTAINED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR 8620

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-17-2008 Continued To Apr-03-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL INDUSTRIES, A.R.Y.Z. CORP., E.R.X. CORP., GLAMOUR INDUSTRIES CO. AND RAZY PROPERTIES, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: CONTINUED TO APRIL 3, 2008 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
